content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://digital-strategy.ec.europa.eu/en/policies/digital-services-act", "source_title": "The Digital Services Act | Shaping Europe's digital future", "source_type": "web", "source_quality": 0.7, "overall_relevance": 0.65, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "Platforms must respond to your reports and offer options to appeal their decisions. - Enhanced protection for minors - Platforms must take m...", "direct_quote": "Platforms must respond to your reports and offer options to appeal their decisions. - Enhanced protection for minors - Platforms must take measures to safeguard minors on their services, such as reducing the risks of exposure to age-inappropriate con", "fact_category": "causal_link", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "For the same reason, the DSA requires marketplaces to make reasonable efforts to perform random checks on products sold on their service or ...", "direct_quote": "For the same reason, the DSA requires marketplaces to make reasonable efforts to perform random checks on products sold on their service or adopt new technologies for product traceability.", "fact_category": "statistic", "relevance_score": 0.65, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 2 facts."}]}
